title: qavor project manifest
description: Project-level manifest. Lives at the root of the project repo as `qavor.yaml`. Defines workspace identity and is the single source of truth for the list of repos that make up the workspace. No other manifest kind contributes to the repo set.

name.description: Human-readable workspace name. Used as the compose project namespace and the on-disk workspace identifier.

root_url.description: Base git URL for repos in this project. Combined with `repo_prefix` and a repo `name` to derive the clone URL when no explicit `url` is given.

repo_prefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to repo names when deriving clone URLs.

default_branch.description: Default branch used when a repo entry does not pin its own.

remote.description: Hint for clone URL form when `root_url` is a host instead of a full URL.

groups.description: Named groups of repo names. A repo may appear in multiple groups.

repositories.description: The complete, authoritative list of repos that compose the workspace. This is the only place the repo set is declared. Each entry is either a bare name (URL derived from `git.root_url` + `git.repo_prefix` + name) or an object with explicit fields.

url.description: Explicit git URL. Overrides URL derivation from `git.root_url` + `git.repo_prefix`.

path.description: Workspace-relative clone path. Defaults to `./<name>` (or `./<name>.git` to match the conventional layout).

groups.description: Inline group memberships in addition to the top-level `groups` map.

optional.description: Skip rather than fail if cloning is not authorized.

allOf.description: At most one of branch, tag, or commit may be set.
